name: Curried Potatoes with Eggplant (Aloo Baigan Sabji)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ginger, green chilies, and shredded coconut in a blender with 1/3 cup of water until smooth.
2. Add garam masala and pulse for a few seconds. Set aside.
3. Heat ghee in a pan over medium heat.
4. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds to the hot ghee; fry for a few seconds.
5. Stir in asafetida, then add the cubed potatoes.
6. Cook the potatoes for 5 minutes until they are lightly browned.
7. Pour in the mixture from the blender.
8. Add turmeric, coriander, eggplant cubes, salt, and half of the fresh coriander.
9. Mix gently to prevent breaking the vegetables.
10. Reduce heat and continue cooking until all liquid has evaporated.
11. Stir in lemon juice and remaining fresh coriander; serve.
